sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_varchar (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name CHARACTER VARYING);
INSERT INTO test_varchar (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test User');
UPDATE test_varchar SET name = 'Updated User' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_varchar WHERE name LIKE 'Test%';
INSERT INTO test_varchar (id, name) VALUES (2, CONCAT('User ', 2));
